current_metaculus.title: How many charges will the ICC confirm against Rodrigo Duterte before May 2026?

token_output.content:
MultipleChoiceReport(question=MultipleChoiceQuestion(question_text='How many charges will the ICC confirm against Rodrigo Duterte before May 2026?', id_of_post=42665, page_url='https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42665', id_of_question=42610, state=, num_forecasters=0, num_predictions=0, resolution_criteria='This question will resolve as the number of charges confirmed for trial by the International Criminal Court against Rodrigo Duterte in the Pre-Trial Chamberâ€™s confirmation of charges decision.', fine_print='If the ICC does not issue a confirmation of charges decision against Rodrigo Duterte before May 2026, this question will resolve as No Decision.', background_info="On March 7, 2025, the International Criminal Court issued an arrest warrant for former Filipino President [Rodrigo Duterte](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rodrigo_Duterte). On March 11, Duterte was [arrested](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Arrest_of_Rodrigo_Duterte) by the Philippine National Police and Interpol, which transferred him to the Hague to face trial for the charges. The ICC has charged Duterte with [three separate counts](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/2/23/icc-to-hold-hearings-on-charges-against-ex-philippine-president-duterte) of crimes against humanity, with each count pertaining to a different set of victims whose murder Duterte allegedly ordered during the [Philippine drug war](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philippine_drug_war). In order for the case to proceed to trial, the ICC must first [confirm the charges](https://www.icc-cpi.int/philippines/duterte), that is, the Pre-Trial Chamber must determine that there are substantial grounds to believe the accused committed the crimes charged. Duterte's [confirmation of charges hearing](https://www.icc-cpi.int/news/icc-concludes-confirmation-charges-hearing-duterte-case) concluded on February 27, 2026, and the ICC has a maximum of 60 days from then to make a decision, with the possibility of extension in the case of exceptional circumstances.", unit_of_measure='', close_time=datetime.datetime(2026, 4, 28, 1, 0), The ICC has charged Duterte with [three separate counts](https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/2/23/icc-to-hold-hearings-on-charges-against-ex-philippine-president-duterte) of crimes against humanity, with each count pertaining to a different set of victims whose murder Duterte allegedly ordered during the [Philippine drug war](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philippine_drug_war).
